author: ChG1
content: Plan: Change jj_origin_url/git_origin_url to return Result<Option<String>> — Ok(None) when no origin remote is configured (non-success exit). derive_from_repo wraps that None with the actionable error: first line names --slug as the fix, cites the cause (no origin remote), and omits the literal jj/git command strings. Drop the .with_context() wrapper in main.rs so the actionable line stays at the top. Add unit test: git-init a tempdir without a remote and assert the error names --slug and does not leak command strings.
